example_reviews: its really cool but i cant make the call they are talking about

moodpath has made my life so much easier ive been told to keep a mood diary by my therapists in the past however i never followed through because i didnt know where to begin and how to go about it with moodpath theres a framework in place and i can just mark my moods and reflect on them its great
this app is no longer prompting me for questions so i forget to document frequently
any decent features are locked and its just an ad for better health
stupid pop psych bs and other nonsense you gotta be a fool to trust an app to evaluate your mental health

mood path was great being able to add emotions to the list the various insights and audio files available being able to compile a record to provide to your doctor that was a solid and comprehensive timeline of emotional mental fluctuations was amazing was minddoc is not that anymore not without paying a monthly subscription
even the free version is really insightful
so far this app is been amazing for me it helps me keep on track with being aware of my mood
i enjoy the concept of this app but i need a reminder if i must input info xs daily
